issues.description: First effect has trigger 'Trigger' with action 'PlaySelf' — does not match card text at all. Should be removed.
Trigger should be 'OnKO' but card text says 'removed from the field by an effect' which includes but is broader than KO. Should use a more general trigger or custom logic if available.
Missing condition checking that removed Character has type including 'Whitebeard Pirates'. Condition should verify this.
Missing duration 'DuringYourTurn' — card text explicitly states '[Your Turn]', which is a major violation.

Second action missing: 'place 1 card from your hand at the top or bottom of your deck' is not represented. Should have a second action (likely SearchDeck or similar; exact action type depends on DSL vocabulary for deck placement).
Missing '[Once Per Turn]' constraint — card text specifies this, should be encoded in condition or metadata.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When your Character with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" is removed from the field by an effect, draw 1 card. Then, place 1 card from your hand at the top or bottom of your deck.
